Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 53 

DEMINIMIS_PD_FLAG 

LABEL: Part D Deminimis Paid Flag 

DESCRIPTION: If beneficiaries who are eligible for Medicare and Medicaid (often called full benefit dual eligibles) 
enroll in Part D plans with premiums higher than the regional benchmark, they are responsible for 
paying the premium amount above the benchmark. The benchmark is a statutorily defined amount 
that is
